case_title: NORA CARRASCO VS. ELBA ISABEL DIGHERO

docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO RESOLVE ISSUE OF INVALID/RETURNED CHECK (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRASCO, NORA
INVALID/RETURNED CHECK FOR TRANSACTION W0523130S001 FOR SMALL CLAIMS <= 1500
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY CARRASCO, NORA AS TO DEFENDANT DIGHERO, ELBA ISABEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85. SERVED FEB-23-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DIGHERO, ELBA ISABEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO RESOLVE ISSUE OF INVALID/RETURNED CHECK TO APR-24-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NORA CARRASCO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELBA ISABEL DIGHERO IS NOT PRESENT. MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO RESOLVE ISSUE OF INVALID/RETURNED CHECK WITHIN 25 DAYS OF MARCH 15, 2023 RE: NOTICE OF INVALID CHECK. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
